_strata_note: MERGE this `hooks` block into the project's .claude/settings.json — do NOT overwrite the whole file. If a `hooks.PostToolUse` array already exists, append this matcher entry to it. The hook mirrors any edited docs/*.md into raw/*.md (the read-only AI mirror) and appends a pending_ingest marker to wiki/log.md. The command path is project-relative, so it runs from the repo root; ensure scripts/sync_raw_mirror.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x).
